example: Please cancel my hotel reservation for next weekend.
exampleCn: 请取消我下周末的酒店预订。

example: The automatic doors open when you walk near them.
exampleCn: 自动门会在你走近时打开。

example: You can see the comet with the naked eye tonight.
exampleCn: 今晚你可以用肉眼看到那颗彗星。

example: Her ambition is to become a famous surgeon someday.
exampleCn: 她的志向是有朝一日成为著名的外科医生。

example: We hold a weekly meeting every Monday morning.
exampleCn: 我们每周一上午开一次例会。

example: An electrical fault caused the fire in the factory.
exampleCn: 一处电路故障引发了工厂的火灾。

example: There is no logic in his strange argument at all.
exampleCn: 他那奇怪的论点毫无逻辑可言。

example: My phone battery dies before the end of the day.
exampleCn: 我的手机电池不到一天就没电了。

example: The bridge must pass a safety inspection every year.
exampleCn: 这座桥每年都必须通过安全检查。

example: A single flame lit up the dark little room.
exampleCn: 一束火焰照亮了那间昏暗的小屋。

example: The company has a legitimate claim to this land.
exampleCn: 这家公司对这块土地拥有合法的所有权。

example: He walked across the cold floor with bare feet.
exampleCn: 他光着脚走过冰冷的地板。

example: New students attend an orientation during their first week.
exampleCn: 新生在第一周要参加入学指导活动。

example: The film earned a gross of two million dollars.
exampleCn: 这部电影的总收入达到两百万美元。

example: A cluster of grapes hung from the old vine.
exampleCn: 一串葡萄挂在老藤上。

example: I always take a hot shower after the gym.
exampleCn: 我健身后总会洗个热水澡。

example: The novel tries to depict life in a small village.
exampleCn: 这部小说试图描绘小村庄里的生活。

example: Please throw the rubbish into the bin outside.
exampleCn: 请把垃圾扔到外面的垃圾桶里。

example: Safe disposal of chemical waste protects the environment.
exampleCn: 安全处理化学废料能保护环境。

example: This shirt is made from natural cotton fibre.
exampleCn: 这件衬衫由天然棉纤维制成。

example: We watched a romantic comedy at the cinema last night.
exampleCn: 我们昨晚在电影院看了一部爱情喜剧。

example: The council voted to impose a trade sanction on them.
exampleCn: 委员会投票决定对他们实施贸易制裁。

example: The hospital closed because of inadequate funding.
exampleCn: 这家医院因资金不足而关闭。

example: Not a single civilian was hurt during the operation.
exampleCn: 行动中没有一名平民受伤。

example: Engineers had to devise a cheaper way to build it.
exampleCn: 工程师们必须设计一种更省钱的建造方法。

example: Every grain of rice comes from a farmer's hard work.
exampleCn: 每一粒米都来自农民的辛勤劳动。

example: World leaders were quick to condemn the violent attack.
exampleCn: 各国领导人迅速谴责了这次暴力袭击。

example: I swear I will never tell anyone your secret.
exampleCn: 我发誓绝不会把你的秘密告诉任何人。

example: She decided to devote her life to helping the poor.
exampleCn: 她决定毕生致力于帮助穷人。

example: The president signed a declaration of independence that morning.
exampleCn: 那天早上总统签署了独立宣言。

example: Please show some identification before entering the building.
exampleCn: 进入大楼前请出示身份证明。

example: His words do not correspond with his actual actions.
exampleCn: 他的言辞与他的实际行动不符。

example: The odds of winning the lottery are extremely small.
exampleCn: 中彩票的几率极小。

example: We may need to modify the design to cut costs.
exampleCn: 我们可能需要修改设计以降低成本。

example: The couple got married in a small village chapel.
exampleCn: 这对新人在乡村的一座小教堂里结了婚。

example: Every youngster in the team dreams of playing professionally.
exampleCn: 队里的每个少年都梦想成为职业球员。

example: Try to make a rational decision, not an emotional one.
exampleCn: 尽量做出理性的决定，而不是感情用事。

example: The two offices are physically separate but share one system.
exampleCn: 这两个办公室实际上是分开的，但共用一套系统。

example: He has no conception of how hard farmers work.
exampleCn: 他对农民的辛劳毫无概念。

example: Patience is an important attribute of a good teacher.
exampleCn: 耐心是好老师的一项重要特质。

example: The city faces an acute shortage of clean water.
exampleCn: 这座城市面临严重的清洁水短缺。

example: The old bridge has great artistic value to the town.
exampleCn: 这座古桥对小镇有极高的艺术价值。

example: Take one dose of this medicine after each meal.
exampleCn: 每餐饭后服用一剂这种药。

example: Lower taxes can act as a stimulus to the economy.
exampleCn: 降低税收可以对经济起到刺激作用。

example: The two unions merged to form a national federation.
exampleCn: 两个工会合并成立了一个全国性联合会。

example: An ugly scar ran across the side of his face.
exampleCn: 一道难看的伤疤横在他的脸侧。

example: The movie tries to portray the artist as a hero.
exampleCn: 这部电影试图把这位艺术家刻画成英雄。

example: Doctors recommend moderate exercise three times a week.
exampleCn: 医生建议每周进行三次适度的锻炼。

example: The experiment was designed to test a new hypothesis.
exampleCn: 这个实验旨在检验一个新假设。

example: A water molecule contains two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
exampleCn: 一个水分子包含两个氢原子和一个氧原子。

example: My grandmother taught me the basics of Chinese cooking.
exampleCn: 我奶奶教会了我中式烹饪的基础。

example: The letter carrier delivers our mail every morning.
exampleCn: 邮递员每天早上给我们送信。

example: We need a reliable car for the long journey.
exampleCn: 我们需要一辆可靠的汽车来跑长途。

example: Please do not disturb me while I am studying.
exampleCn: 我学习的时候请不要打扰我。

example: The twins wore identical dresses to the party.
exampleCn: 这对双胞胎穿着一模一样的裙子去参加聚会。

example: They spent the summer on a quiet isle in Greece.
exampleCn: 他们在希腊一座宁静的小岛上度过了夏天。

example: She is the sole owner of this small bookshop.
exampleCn: 她是这家小书店的唯一所有者。

example: I saw an advertisement for the new phone on television.
exampleCn: 我在电视上看到了那款新手机的广告。

example: Every car should carry a first aid kit.
exampleCn: 每辆汽车都应该配备一个急救工具箱。

example: My daughter wants a rabbit as a pet.
exampleCn: 我女儿想养一只兔子当宠物。

example: It was a miracle that everyone survived the crash.
exampleCn: 所有人都在事故中幸存下来，真是个奇迹。

example: The dancers moved to the rhythm of the drums.
exampleCn: 舞者们随着鼓的节奏舞动。

example: Our accountant checks the company books every month.
exampleCn: 我们的会计每个月核对公司账目。

example: The fishing boats return before the tide goes out.
exampleCn: 渔船在退潮之前返回。

example: The actor forgot his lines and checked the script.
exampleCn: 演员忘了台词，于是看了看剧本。

example: Cutting prices is a common tactic to attract customers.
exampleCn: 降价是吸引顾客的常见策略。

example: A swallow built its nest under our roof this spring.
exampleCn: 今年春天一只燕子在我们屋檐下筑了巢。

example: Organic farming is becoming popular in this region.
exampleCn: 有机农业在这个地区越来越流行。

example: She practices the piano for two hours every day.
exampleCn: 她每天练两个小时钢琴。

example: Drivers are liable for any damage they cause.
exampleCn: 司机要对自己造成的任何损失负责。

example: The removal of the old statue caused a public debate.
exampleCn: 拆除那座旧雕像引发了公众争论。

example: She wrapped the sleeping baby in a soft blanket.
exampleCn: 她用一条柔软的毯子裹住熟睡的婴儿。

example: This shop sells fine cloth for making suits.
exampleCn: 这家店出售做西装用的上等布料。

example: The interior of the old church is beautifully decorated.
exampleCn: 这座古老教堂的内部装饰得很精美。

example: Please give me a concrete example of your plan.
exampleCn: 请给我举一个你计划的具体例子。

example: You cannot buy this medicine without a doctor's prescription.
exampleCn: 没有医生的处方你买不到这种药。

example: The police gave chase to the stolen car.
exampleCn: 警察对那辆被盗的汽车展开了追捕。

example: The young recruit completed his first month of training.
exampleCn: 这名新兵完成了第一个月的训练。

example: Volunteers render valuable help to flood victims every year.
exampleCn: 志愿者们每年都为洪灾受害者提供宝贵的帮助。

example: We took a taxi from the airport to the hotel.
exampleCn: 我们从机场打车去了酒店。

example: After hours of debate, the committee finally reached a consensus.
exampleCn: 经过数小时的辩论，委员会终于达成了一致意见。

example: Many buildings here date back to the colonial period.
exampleCn: 这里的许多建筑可以追溯到殖民时期。

example: Let's go to the cinema to see the new film.
exampleCn: 我们去电影院看那部新电影吧。

example: Grandma baked an apple pie for the family dinner.
exampleCn: 奶奶为家庭晚餐烤了一个苹果馅饼。

example: Nothing could induce him to change his final decision.
exampleCn: 什么都无法诱使他改变最终决定。

example: The detective found an important clue at the scene.
exampleCn: 侦探在现场发现了一条重要线索。

example: He put a slice of cheese on the bread.
exampleCn: 他在面包上放了一片奶酪。

example: Doctors are still studying the underlying cause of the disease.
exampleCn: 医生们仍在研究这种疾病的根本原因。

example: This mountain is sacred to the local people.
exampleCn: 这座山对当地人来说是神圣的。

example: She turned on the lamp and began to read.
exampleCn: 她打开台灯，开始读书。

example: Reading aloud helps develop a child's cognitive skills.
exampleCn: 大声朗读有助于培养孩子的认知能力。

example: She is a leading expert in the domain of medicine.
exampleCn: 她是医学领域的顶尖专家。

example: Only one student passed, namely the youngest girl.
exampleCn: 只有一名学生通过了，也就是那个最小的女孩。

example: My mother loves to knit sweaters for the whole family.
exampleCn: 我妈妈喜欢给全家人织毛衣。

example: The school plans to integrate technology into every classroom.
exampleCn: 学校计划把科技融入每一间教室。

example: She kept a small fragment of the broken vase.

example: The new law aims to promote equity in education.

example: Regular exercise greatly improves your physical fitness.

exampleCn: 士兵的坟墓上摆放着鲜花。

example: The new statute protects workers from unfair dismissal.
exampleCn: 这项新法令保护工人免遭不公平解雇。

example: The cat curled up and slept on her lap.
exampleCn: 猫蜷成一团，睡在她的膝盖上。

example: The new policy will have only a marginal effect on prices.
exampleCn: 新政策对物价只会产生微小的影响。

exampleCn: 她低声细语，以免被人听到。

example: The bulk of the work was finished before noon.
exampleCn: 大部分工作在中午之前就完成了。

example: The new policy led to a decrease in traffic accidents.
exampleCn: 新政策使交通事故有所减少。

example: An experienced guide led us safely through the mountains.
exampleCn: 一位经验丰富的向导带我们安全穿过了群山。

example: The farmer set a trap to catch the fox.

example: They celebrated their tenth wedding anniversary in Paris.
exampleCn: 他们在巴黎庆祝了结婚十周年纪念日。

example: He fell asleep on the couch watching television.
exampleCn: 他看着电视在沙发上睡着了。

example: Keep a firm grip on the rope while climbing.
exampleCn: 攀爬时要紧紧抓住绳子。

exampleCn: 这名记者获得了对那位歌手的独家专访。

example: The soldiers eat together in the army mess every evening.
exampleCn: 士兵们每天晚上在军队食堂一起用餐。

example: According to legend, a dragon once lived in this lake.
exampleCn: 传说这个湖里曾住着一条龙。

example: She drops her son at the nursery before work.
exampleCn: 她上班前把儿子送到托儿所。

example: New laws will regulate the sale of online games.
exampleCn: 新法律将对网络游戏的销售进行管理。

example: The hotel offers a superb view of the harbour.

example: Working from home has become the norm in many companies.
exampleCn: 居家办公在许多公司已成为常态。

example: She was deeply upset by the bad news from home.
exampleCn: 家里传来的坏消息让她非常难过。

example: I will never forgive him for breaking his promise.
exampleCn: 我永远不会原谅他违背诺言。

example: Drinking tea at dawn is a daily ritual for him.
exampleCn: 清晨喝茶是他每天的固定仪式。

example: The new hall can accommodate up to five hundred guests.

example: A small insect landed quietly on the white flower.
exampleCn: 一只小昆虫悄悄落在白花上。

example: The drought caused a serious shortage of fresh water.
exampleCn: 干旱造成了淡水的严重短缺。

example: A quiet office is desirable for this kind of work.
exampleCn: 对这种工作来说，安静的办公室是再好不过的。

example: Constant criticism can undermine a child's confidence.
exampleCn: 不断的批评会逐渐削弱孩子的自信心。

example: Report any safety problems to your immediate superior.
exampleCn: 有任何安全问题都要向你的直属上级报告。

example: The children watched the magic show with wide eyes.
exampleCn: 孩子们睁大眼睛看着魔术表演。

example: The government launched a campaign to combat air pollution.
exampleCn: 政府发起了一场对抗空气污染的行动。

example: The surgeon performed a five-hour operation on his heart.
exampleCn: 外科医生为他做了一台五个小时的心脏手术。

example: Cut the stem of the rose at an angle.
exampleCn: 把玫瑰的茎斜着剪断。

example: The fishing fleet returned to port before the storm.

example: He sought legal counsel before signing the contract.

example: The crystal glasses sparkled under the bright lights.

example: Owls hunt small animals at night in the forest.
exampleCn: 猫头鹰夜间在森林里捕猎小动物。

example: He wore an old pair of jeans to the picnic.
exampleCn: 他穿着一条旧牛仔裤去野餐。

example: The city will initiate a recycling program next month.
exampleCn: 该市下个月将启动一项回收计划。

example: The captain keeps a daily log of the ship's position.
exampleCn: 船长每天记录船只位置的日志。

example: His shout produced a loud echo in the empty hall.
exampleCn: 他的喊声在空荡的大厅里产生了响亮的回声。

example: The cat made a sudden leap onto the table.
exampleCn: 猫猛地一跃跳上了桌子。

example: A bronze sculpture of a horse stands in the square.
exampleCn: 广场上立着一座马的青铜雕塑。

example: Police carried out a raid on the illegal factory.

example: Water is a compound of hydrogen and oxygen.
exampleCn: 水是氢和氧的化合物。

example: Mix the flour with eggs and milk to make pancakes.
exampleCn: 把面粉和鸡蛋、牛奶混合做成薄饼。

example: There is a subtle difference between these two colours.
exampleCn: 这两种颜色之间有细微的差别。

example: The new software runs well on older hardware.
exampleCn: 这款新软件在较旧的硬件上也运行良好。

example: Heavy drinking can cause serious damage to your liver.
exampleCn: 酗酒会对肝脏造成严重损害。

example: All factories must comply with the new safety rules.

example: The island was once a French colony for many years.

example: We used a pump to remove water from the basement.
exampleCn: 我们用水泵把地下室的水抽了出去。

example: The company holds a monopoly on the local phone service.
exampleCn: 这家公司垄断了当地的电话业务。

example: Online banking lets you pay bills from your phone.

example: Tourists visit the ancient temple on the mountain every day.

example: A local bank became the main sponsor of the marathon.

exampleCn: 他演讲的实质是变革需要时间。

exampleCn: 这位教练因训练方法严苛而受到批评。

example: These shoes sell at a retail price of fifty dollars.

example: The instructions are straightforward and easy to follow.
exampleCn: 这些说明简单明了，容易照做。

example: There is a rumour that the factory will close soon.

example: A flash of lightning lit up the night sky.
exampleCn: 一道闪电照亮了夜空。

example: The discovery of fire changed the history of humanity.

example: Attendance at the morning lecture was surprisingly high.

example: These similar road signs often confuse new drivers.

example: The palace looks magnificent in the evening light.

example: Good teachers know how to motivate their students to learn.

example: The committee rejected the proposition to raise ticket prices.

example: He reported the theft of his bicycle to the police.
exampleCn: 他向警方报告了自行车被盗的事。

example: The police will strictly enforce the new parking rules.
exampleCn: 警方将严格执行新的停车规定。

example: Winning the championship was a great triumph for the team.
exampleCn: 夺得冠军是这支球队的巨大胜利。

example: The white house stands on a cliff above the sea.
exampleCn: 那座白房子矗立在海边的悬崖上。

example: The manager was arrested for tax fraud last week.
exampleCn: 那位经理上周因税务欺诈被捕。

example: Several companies will contend for the building contract.
exampleCn: 几家公司将竞争这份建筑合同。

example: The shop displayed an impressive array of fresh fruits.
exampleCn: 店里陈列着一大批令人眼花缭乱的新鲜水果。

example: She is studying chemistry at a famous university.
exampleCn: 她在一所名牌大学学习化学。

example: Workers assemble the cars on a long production line.
exampleCn: 工人们在长长的生产线上组装汽车。

example: They opened a bottle of champagne to celebrate the victory.
exampleCn: 他们开了一瓶香槟庆祝胜利。

example: His rude remarks were meant to provoke an argument.
exampleCn: 他粗鲁的话就是为了挑起争吵。

example: Lower interest rates may stimulate spending and investment.
exampleCn: 降低利率可能会刺激消费和投资。

example: The bears sleep in a cave during the winter.
exampleCn: 熊在冬天睡在洞穴里。

example: Her refusal to sign the contract surprised everyone.
exampleCn: 她拒绝签合同让所有人都很吃惊。

example: The children drew a green monster with three eyes.
exampleCn: 孩子们画了一个长着三只眼睛的绿色怪物。

example: The two countries restored diplomatic relations last year.
exampleCn: 两国去年恢复了外交关系。

example: They signed a deal whereby each side shares the cost.
exampleCn: 他们签署了一项协议，据此双方分摊费用。

example: The new bridge will facilitate trade between the two towns.
exampleCn: 新桥将促进两镇之间的贸易。

example: Lack of money is the biggest obstacle to his plan.
exampleCn: 缺钱是他计划的最大障碍。

example: A volunteer handed me a leaflet about the concert.
exampleCn: 一位志愿者递给我一张音乐会的传单。

example: There was a long rip in the side of the tent.
exampleCn: 帐篷侧面有一道长长的裂口。

example: This herb is often used to make traditional medicine.
exampleCn: 这种药草常被用来制作传统药物。

example: Unemployment is a key indicator of economic health.
exampleCn: 失业率是经济健康状况的重要指标。

example: Change the water filter every three months for safety.
exampleCn: 为了安全起见，每三个月更换一次滤水器。

example: Pollution is a serious threat to marine life.
exampleCn: 污染对海洋生物是一个严重威胁。

example: The survey covered a wide spectrum of political opinions.
exampleCn: 这项调查涵盖了范围广泛的政治观点。

example: The long traffic jam turned our trip into a nightmare.
exampleCn: 长时间的堵车把我们的旅行变成了一场噩梦。

example: Ask your supervisor before leaving work early today.
exampleCn: 今天想早退要先问问你的主管。

example: Thousands of fans filled the arena before the match.
exampleCn: 比赛开始前，数千名球迷挤满了赛场。

example: She wore a long blue skirt to the wedding.
exampleCn: 她穿着一条蓝色长裙参加婚礼。

example: He slowly rose through the company hierarchy to manager.
exampleCn: 他在公司的等级体系中慢慢升到了经理。

example: She teaches mathematics at the local high school.
exampleCn: 她在当地的高中教数学。

example: The new park protects wildlife from illegal hunting.
exampleCn: 新公园保护野生动物免遭非法捕猎。

example: We store old furniture in the basement of our house.
exampleCn: 我们把旧家具存放在房子的地下室里。

example: Heavy rain blocked the drain outside our house.
exampleCn: 大雨堵塞了我们房子外面的排水沟。

example: New machines greatly increased the factory's productivity.
exampleCn: 新机器大大提高了工厂的生产率。

example: The professor explained the central doctrine of the theory.
exampleCn: 教授讲解了该理论的核心学说。

example: Please fill in the questionnaire before you leave.
exampleCn: 离开前请填写这份调查问卷。

example: Washing your hands removes harmful bacteria from your skin.
exampleCn: 洗手能去除皮肤上的有害细菌。

example: She studied sociology to understand how societies change.
exampleCn: 她学习社会学以了解社会是如何变迁的。

example: Always keep a spare key in a safe place.
exampleCn: 一定要在安全的地方放一把备用钥匙。

example: Babies naturally suck their thumbs to comfort themselves.
exampleCn: 婴儿会自然地吮吸拇指来安抚自己。

example: The winners were chosen at random from all entries.
exampleCn: 获奖者是从所有参赛者中随机选出的。

example: Dolphins are highly intelligent animals that learn quickly.
exampleCn: 海豚是学习能力很强的高智商动物。

example: The workers protested against the unfair pay system.
exampleCn: 工人们抗议不公平的薪酬制度。

example: A weird noise came from the empty house at night.
exampleCn: 夜里那座空房子里传来奇怪的声音。

example: It is ridiculous to pay so much for a coffee.
exampleCn: 花这么多钱买一杯咖啡太荒谬了。

example: Keep the receipt in case you want to return it.
exampleCn: 保留好收据，以防你想退货。

example: Their office is on a busy avenue downtown.
exampleCn: 他们的办公室位于市中心一条繁忙的大街上。

example: The hotel is within walking distance of the beach.
exampleCn: 酒店离海滩只有步行的距离。

example: Trucks dump waste at the site outside the city.
exampleCn: 卡车把废料倾倒在城外的场地上。

example: The long silence made everyone feel uncomfortable.
exampleCn: 长时间的沉默让每个人都感到不自在。

example: The great merit of this plan is its low cost.
exampleCn: 这个计划的最大优点是成本低。

example: The team will execute the plan early next week.
exampleCn: 团队将于下周初执行该计划。

example: He broke a limb when he fell from the tree.
exampleCn: 他从树上摔下来摔断了一条腿。

example: The fireworks gave a spectacular show over the river.
exampleCn: 烟花在河面上空呈现出壮观的景象。

example: She hummed a cheerful tune while cooking dinner.
exampleCn: 她一边做晚饭一边哼着欢快的曲子。

example: He left a nasty comment under the photo.
exampleCn: 他在照片下留了一条恶毒的评论。

example: Years of stress gave him a chronic back problem.
exampleCn: 多年的压力使他患上了慢性背疾。
